method: Playwright MCP via Claude Code — live browser extraction

reconciliation_notes.bg-void_vs_bg-base: Wibify uses #0a0a0a as its only dark bg. Within 10 luminance units of Obsidian Aurora #0d0d14. Per reconciliation rule, bg-void mapped to #0a0a0a, bg-base kept at #0d0d14 (LOCKED).
reconciliation_notes.accent-primary: #00D492 — electric emerald green. Used on CTA buttons and decorative accent lines. This is the ONE signature interactive color.
reconciliation_notes.font_decision: Wibify uses Geist (Vercel's geometric sans). Context A retains DM Sans (similar geometric precision, broader weight range 400-800) and Instrument Serif (editorial gravitas). Geist noted as aesthetic inspiration only.
